name: Royal Ratchaburi Golf Club & Resort
notes: Administratively in Ratchaburi province though grouped under Kanchanaburi / River Kwai region by golf travel sites. Address: 76/1 Moo 5, Petch Kasem Rd, Khok-Mor District, Muang, Ratchaburi 70000 (also cited as Tambon Lum Din, Amphoe Mueang Ratchaburi). GPS coordinates (13.621721, 99.739275) from golfdd.com. Green fees: golfdd.com shows 550 THB weekday / 1,050 THB weekend standalone; bundled package 1,450 THB weekday / 1,670 THB weekend (18 holes + caddie + cart). Golfsavers.com shows 800 THB weekday / 1,000 THB weekend. Thailandgolfers.com shows 750 THB weekday. Used 750/1050 as best cross-reference, but figures vary by source and season — confirm with club. Cart compulsory due to hilly terrain (golftripz.com). Caddies listed as 'not available' on golftripz.com but other sources confirm caddie service; likely optional rather than unavailable. Club rental 600 THB per golfasian.com. Shoe rental 200 THB. Drive time 'approximately 2-2.5 hours from Bangkok' per multiple sources; located off Highway 4 heading south toward Cha-Am/Hua Hin, ~1 hour from Kanchanaburi town. 6,785 yards / 6,204 m. Wild monkeys inhabit several holes on course. Website also cited as royalratchaburi.com (allsquaregolf.com). Phone also seen: +66-87-153-0412, +66-86-311-4953. Sources: golfdd.com, golfasian.com, golfsavers.com, allsquaregolf.com, where2golf.com, golftripz.com, 1golf.eu
